code:
import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)

    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_ay = agent_y / (H_f - 1)
    norm_ax = agent_x / (W_f - 1)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)

    tile_ids = state.grid[:, :, 0]
    tile_colors = state.grid[:, :, 1]

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    yy_f = yy.astype(jnp.float32)
    xx_f = xx.astype(jnp.float32)

    # Pocket state
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 3) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 2)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pocket_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[0], 13)
    pocket_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[1], 12)

    # Blue pyramid (tile=5, color=3)
    blue_pyr_mask = (tile_ids == 5) & (tile_colors == 3)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_exists = jnp.clip(blue_pyr_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    rel_pyr_y = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_pyr_x = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_pyr = (jnp.abs(blue_pyr_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Yellow hex (tile=11, color=5)
    yel_hex_mask = (tile_ids == 11) & (tile_colors == 5)
    yel_hex_count = jnp.sum(yel_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yel_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_exists = jnp.clip(yel_hex_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    rel_hex_y = (yel_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_hex_x = (yel_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_hex = (jnp.abs(yel_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(yel_hex_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Front tile
    dy_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_f, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_f, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_ids[front_y, front_x], 13)
    front_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_colors[front_y, front_x], 12)
    front_is_blue_pyr = ((tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 5) & (tile_colors[front_y, front_x] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_floor = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 1).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_closed_door = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 9).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_locked_door = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 8).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_open_door = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 10).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_to_hex_dist = (jnp.abs(front_y.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_y) + 
                         jnp.abs(front_x.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_x))
    front_adj_hex = (front_to_hex_dist <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_floor_adj_hex = front_is_floor * front_adj_hex

    # Agent adjacency
    agent_adj_hex = ((jnp.abs(agent_y - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yel_hex_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_adj_pyr = ((jnp.abs(agent_y - blue_pyr_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - blue_pyr_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Task phase
    phase_pickup = (blue_pyr_exists * pocket_empty)
    phase_place = holding_green_ball
    can_place_now = holding_green_ball * front_floor_adj_hex
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0

    # Individual door tracking (4 doors in 4-room layout)
    # Find each door by scanning for closed/locked doors
    closed_door_mask = (tile_ids == 9)
    locked_door_mask = (tile_ids == 8)
    open_door_mask = (tile_ids == 10)
    n_closed = jnp.sum(closed_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_locked = jnp.sum(locked_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_open = jnp.sum(open_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)

    # For each of 4 possible doors, find their positions
    # Use sorted approach: find doors by quadrant of the grid
    # Top half vs bottom half, left vs right
    mid_y = H_f / 2.0
    mid_x = W_f / 2.0

    # Door in each quadrant (closed or locked)
    all_blockable = closed_door_mask | locked_door_mask
    all_doors = all_blockable | open_door_mask

    # Top doors (y < mid_y)
    top_door_mask = all_blockable & (yy_f < mid_y)
    top_door_count = jnp.sum(top_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    top_door_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * top_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(top_door_count, 1.0)
    top_door_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * top_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(top_door_count, 1.0)
    top_door_exists = jnp.clip(top_door_count, 0.0, 1.0)

    # Bottom doors (y >= mid_y)
    bot_door_mask = all_blockable & (yy_f >= mid_y)
    bot_door_count = jnp.sum(bot_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    bot_door_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * bot_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(bot_door_count, 1.0)
    bot_door_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * bot_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(bot_door_count, 1.0)
    bot_door_exists = jnp.clip(bot_door_count, 0.0, 1.0)

    # Left doors (x < mid_x)
    left_door_mask = all_blockable & (xx_f < mid_x)
    left_door_count = jnp.sum(left_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    left_door_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * left_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(left_door_count, 1.0)
    left_door_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * left_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(left_door_count, 1.0)
    left_door_exists = jnp.clip(left_door_count, 0.0, 1.0)

    # Right doors (x >= mid_x)
    right_door_mask = all_blockable & (xx_f >= mid_x)
    right_door_count = jnp.sum(right_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    right_door_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * right_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(right_door_count, 1.0)
    right_door_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * right_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(right_door_count, 1.0)
    right_door_exists = jnp.clip(right_door_count, 0.0, 1.0)

    # Relative positions to each door group
    rel_top_door_y = (top_door_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_top_door_x = (top_door_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    rel_bot_door_y = (bot_door_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_bot_door_x = (bot_door_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    rel_left_door_y = (left_door_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_left_door_x = (left_door_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    rel_right_door_y = (right_door_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_right_door_x = (right_door_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)

    # All open doors (for navigation through)
    open_door_count = jnp.sum(open_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    open_door_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * open_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(open_door_count, 1.0)
    open_door_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * open_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(open_door_count, 1.0)
    rel_open_door_y = (open_door_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_open_door_x = (open_door_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)

    # Which room is agent in? (quadrant)
    in_top_left = ((agent_y < mid_y) & (agent_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    in_top_right = ((agent_y < mid_y) & (agent_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    in_bot_left = ((agent_y >= mid_y) & (agent_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    in_bot_right = ((agent_y >= mid_y) & (agent_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Which room is blue pyramid in?
    pyr_in_top_left = ((blue_pyr_y < mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_in_top_right = ((blue_pyr_y < mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_in_bot_left = ((blue_pyr_y >= mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_in_bot_right = ((blue_pyr_y >= mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Which room is yellow hex in?
    hex_in_top_left = ((yel_hex_y < mid_y) & (yel_hex_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_in_top_right = ((yel_hex_y < mid_y) & (yel_hex_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_in_bot_left = ((yel_hex_y >= mid_y) & (yel_hex_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_in_bot_right = ((yel_hex_y >= mid_y) & (yel_hex_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Same room as target indicators
    agent_same_room_as_pyr = (
        (in_top_left * pyr_in_top_left) + (in_top_right * pyr_in_top_right) +
        (in_bot_left * pyr_in_bot_left) + (in_bot_right * pyr_in_bot_right)
    )
    agent_same_room_as_hex = (
        (in_top_left * hex_in_top_left) + (in_top_right * hex_in_top_right) +
        (in_bot_left * hex_in_bot_left) + (in_bot_right * hex_in_bot_right)
    )

    # 7x7 local egocentric view (98 values)
    local_tiles = []
    for dy_l in range(-3, 4):
        for dx_l in range(-3, 4):
            gy = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_l, 0, H - 1)
            gx = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_l, 0, W - 1)
            t = tile_ids[gy, gx].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
            c = tile_colors[gy, gx].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
            local_tiles.append(t)
            local_tiles.append(c)
    local_obs = jnp.stack(local_tiles)  # 98 elements

    structured = jnp.concatenate([
        # Agent (6)
        jnp.array([norm_ay, norm_ax]),
        dir_oh,

        # Pocket (25 + 4)
        pocket_tile_oh,
        pocket_color_oh,
        jnp.array([pocket_empty, holding_green_ball, phase_pickup, phase_place]),

        # Blue pyramid (7)
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_y / (H_f - 1), blue_pyr_x / (W_f - 1),
                   rel_pyr_y, rel_pyr_x,
                   dist_pyr, blue_pyr_exists, agent_adj_pyr]),

        # Yellow hex (7)
        jnp.array([yel_hex_y / (H_f - 1), yel_hex_x / (W_f - 1),
                   rel_hex_y, rel_hex_x,
                   dist_hex, yel_hex_exists, agent_adj_hex]),

        # Front tile (25 + 6)
        front_tile_oh,
        front_color_oh,
        jnp.array([front_is_blue_pyr, front_adj_hex, front_is_floor,
                   front_is_closed_door, front_is_locked_door, front_floor_adj_hex]),

        # Task flags (3)
        jnp.array([can_place_now, n_closed / 4.0, n_open / 4.0]),

        # Room membership (12)
        jnp.array([in_top_left, in_top_right, in_bot_left, in_bot_right,
                   pyr_in_top_left, pyr_in_top_right, pyr_in_bot_left, pyr_in_bot_right,
                   hex_in_top_left, hex_in_top_right, hex_in_bot_left, hex_in_bot_right]),

        # Same room indicators (2)
        jnp.array([agent_same_room_as_pyr, agent_same_room_as_hex]),

        # Door info by region (12)
        jnp.array([rel_top_door_y, rel_top_door_x, top_door_exists,
                   rel_bot_door_y, rel_bot_door_x, bot_door_exists,
                   rel_left_door_y, rel_left_door_x, left_door_exists,
                   rel_right_door_y, rel_right_door_x, right_door_exists]),

        # Open door info (3)
        jnp.array([rel_open_door_y, rel_open_door_x, n_open / 4.0]),

        # Step (1)
        jnp.array([step_norm]),

        # Local view (98)
        local_obs,
    ])
    # 6 + 29 + 7 + 7 + 31 + 3 + 12 + 2 + 12 + 3 + 1 + 98 = 211

    return structured.astype(jnp.float32)
